meta-description: Learn about self-employment ledgers by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Self-employment ledger
excerpt: Any accurate, detailed record of your self-employment income and expenses. It can be a spreadsheet, a document from an accounting software program, a handwritten "ledger" book, or anything that records all self-employment income and expenses.
content:
Any accurate, detailed record of your self-employment income and expenses. It can be a spreadsheet, a document from an accounting software program, a handwritten "ledger" book, or anything that records all self-employment income and expenses.

Related Content

  • Find out how to report self-employment income to the Marketplace
